description_long: This is a gold-colored, retro-futuristic taxi modeled after the iconic DeLorean DMC-12, featuring distinctive gull-wing doors and a wedge-shaped front. The vehicle is equipped with two large, black exhaust turbines at the rear, along with visible mechanical components and tubing, suggesting a modified or high-tech propulsion system. The sides of the taxi display 'NYC TAXI' branding, a taxi company logo, and a prominent roof sign that reads 'EXPERIENCE THE FUTURE.' The front and rear both have DMC branding, and the rear view reveals a detailed bumper and taillight assembly. The wheels are classic DeLorean style, and the windows are tinted black, obscuring the interior. The overall design blends elements of a traditional taxi with science fiction aesthetics, making it stand out in any urban environment.
description: A gold, DeLorean-inspired taxi with futuristic rear turbines, NYC taxi branding, and a prominent roof sign, blending classic and sci-fi design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wedge-shaped gold hood, black windshield, and DMC branding, with the twin rear turbines visible above the roofline.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the 'NYC TAXI' branding, company logo, roof sign, and the exposed rear turbines and mechanical details.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the dual turbines, detailed bumper, taillights, and DMC branding, with visible tubing and mechanical parts.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the gold body, roof sign, and rear turbines, with additional mechanical details visible.
